citations.quote: the said Court of Edinb University holds the Tenancy Agreement as terminated as at 1.

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0020 is a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to student Anfal Elbushra, dated 20 April 2026, citing breach of tenancy.
The Notice states the tenancy is terminated as at '1.' — the day and month are missing due to OCR corruption.
The unreadable termination date creates a risk of incorrect eviction timeline and procedural challenge.
OCR confidence is 0.65; the termination date field is corrupted. Human review of the original JPEG image is required to resolve the date.

proposed_artifacts.content: Human review required: examine the original JPEG image NAP-SRC-0020 to determine the correct termination date after 'as at 1.' in the Notice to Quit. The OCR extracted only '1.' — likely a day (1st) but month and year are missing. The document date is 20 April 2026. Confirm the full termination date and update the record.
proposed_artifacts.title: Human review note for termination date in NAP-SRC-0020

proposed_tasks.instructions: Review the original JPEG image NAP-SRC-0020 to extract the full termination date from the Notice to Quit. The OCR shows only '1.' — determine the correct day, month, and year. Update the extracted text and any related records.
proposed_tasks.title: Resolve termination date from NAP-SRC-0020 image

risk_flags.description: Missing termination date may invalidate the notice or cause procedural challenge.

summary: OCR-extracted text from NAP-SRC-0020 (a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to student Anfal Elbushra) contains a corrupted termination date: '1.' with no day or month. The document states the tenancy is terminated as at that date. The OCR is low-confidence (0.65) and the date field is unreadable. Human review of the original image is required to determine the correct termination date.

uncertainties.reason: OCR corruption: the termination date reads only '1.' — day and month are missing.
